howItWorks.intro: This travel currency exchange fee calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Total Fees
rules.formula: Fees = Amount x Fee Rate + Fixed Fees
rules.explanation: The percentage markup charged by the exchange method plus any flat transaction fees.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.q: What is the cheapest way to exchange currency for travel?
faq.a: A no-foreign-transaction-fee credit card gives the best rates (typically 0-0.5% markup). ATMs abroad are second best at 1-3% total cost.

faq.q: Should I exchange money before or during my trip?
faq.a: Use ATMs or credit cards at your destination for the best rates. Only exchange a small amount at home for immediate needs upon arrival.
